'''Leeni''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wokling/Legends|wokling]] who lived around the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="SWE" /> She was named for a [[Leeni (spirit)|spirit]] in Ewok mythology.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> She was among a group of young Ewoks that [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]] and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] took swimming as the elder Ewoks hid sunberry trees from the [[Condor dragon/Legends|Mantigrue]]<ref name="THV">{{Ewoks|The Haunted Village}}</ref>, and later was one of the woklings to whom [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] told the story of [[Logray/Legends|Logray]], [[Morag]] and the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]].<ref name="SvS">{{Ewoks|Sunstar vs. Shadowstone}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Leeni.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The Leeni plush toy]]
Leeni first appeared as one of six 8-inch plush woklings made by [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] as part of their ''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (toy line)|Return of the Jedi]]'' toy line.<ref name="Scouting the Galaxy">{{InsiderCite|40|Scouting the Galaxy}}</ref> Her first appearance in fiction was as a background character with no spoken lines in the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] television series.<ref name="THV" />

Her name appears only on a [[Nelvana]] animation model sheet<ref name="Cel">{{WebCite|url=https://www.worthpoint.com/worthopedia/star-wars-ewoks-cartoon-animation-1440870383|text=STAR WARS EWOKS CARTOON ANIMATION PRODUCTION LEEWI MODEL CEL LUCAS #BV859|work=Worthpoint.com|archivedate=20221219190245}}</ref>, which matches a character in the group of young Ewoks in the episode "[[The Haunted Village]]"<ref name="THV" /> and again in "[[Sunstar vs. Shadowstone]]."<ref name="SvS" /> The ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' also refers to her as a character from the cartoon series.<ref name="SWE" />
